'''鈭歷-th-k-ch''' ('''kavathkechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twos|twos]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twos|twos]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-th-k-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kavathkechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
